scripts.dev: pnpm build && concurrently -n api,ui -c blue,green "node packages/cli/dist/index.js start" "node scripts/wait-for-api.mjs && pnpm --filter @markus/web-ui dev"
scripts.dev:watch: pnpm build && concurrently -n tsc,api,ui -c gray,blue,green "pnpm -r --parallel --filter=!@markus/web-ui dev" "node packages/cli/dist/index.js start" "node scripts/wait-for-api.mjs && pnpm --filter @markus/web-ui dev"
scripts.quality: npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.build:publish: pnpm build && pnpm --filter @markus/web-ui build && pnpm --filter @markus-global/cli build:bundle
